content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys signature AoA questions and moves at precisely the right moments. Turn 2 ('just like right now') and Turn 4 ('How is that working for you?') bring the topic into the live moment — the 'how-is-my-anxiety-right-now' move. Turn 10 ('what's wrong with you?') asks the shame question head-on rather than reassuring — the signature move for natural-shame-vs-installed-shame territory. Turn 12 ('Isn't that fucking weird?') names the absurdity of carrying a belief without content. Turn 14/16 reads the somatic 'going down' and instructs the client to stay with it (feel-over-figure). Turn 18 names 'that was grief' rather than asking — a level-3 read. Turn 22 ('you having any problem being seen right now?') is the textbook 'how-is-that-not-here-right-now' question deployed at the exact moment of shift. No generic therapy language, no CBT reframing, no decoration. Every methodology hit is appropriate to its moment.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 28],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings abstract topic into live moment — signature AoA move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'How is that working for you?' — uses the present as laboratory."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'So what's the question?' — collapses puzzle, signature reframe."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What's wrong with you?' — head-on shame question, not reassurance."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names absurdity with humor; permission-giving move."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads somatic 'going down' and instructs to stay — feel-over-figure."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Chases it around the room; 'you don't need to find an answer.'"},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names 'that was grief' — read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 20, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes feared revelation as the gift."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You having any problem being seen right now?' — signature 'how is that not here' deployed perfectly."},
    {"turn": 28, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closes when complete; does not belabor — become-unnecessary."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "chase-it-around-the-room", "shame-as-disconnection", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "natural-shame-vs-installed-shame", "looking-for-whats-wrong"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fear-triangle", "what-are-you-defending", "press-the-button-thought-experiment"],
  "notes": "The 'misses' weren't needed — the path through shame/grief/being-seen made the fear-triangle naming unnecessary. Methodology served the moment rather than being deployed as checklist."
}
